name: Microsoft Earnings, Microsoft’s Core Capability, Amazon Earnings
abstract: This article outlines the subscription model for Stratechery Plus, detailing its offerings which include exclusive access to the Stratechery Update, interviews, and a suite of podcasts such as Sharp Tech, Sharp China, Dithering, Greatest Of All Talk, and Asianometry. It covers pricing, delivery methods, and frequently asked questions regarding account management, sharing, team subscriptions, and invoicing, with an initial mention of Microsoft and Amazon's distinct approaches to AI.
